name: Doll
description: Doll appears in the 'Noah's Circus Ark' chapters. She is a tightrope walker, but she also pretends to be a new, male performer called Freckles.

name: Ed Rothstaylor
description: He was originally the successor to the Rothstaylor family, a ducal family, but was excommunicated from the family after insulting the princess and lost his surname. Due to his past life experience, he has a very serious and cautious personality. Compared to other characters, he acts cold, does not easily give affection to others, does not easily share his worries, and does not easily trust others.

name: Kyousuke Takakura
description: Junko's boyfriend who currently shares an apartment with her. He's also good friends with Hachi and Shouji. His laid-back attitude to life may deem him a slacker in the eyes of many, but he's actually quite perceptive and he coddles Hachi more than Junko would like. Both him and Junko are studying to become artists (his art being Romantic and hers being Post-Modernistic).

He's had a demonic right arm ever since he was attacked by a demon in his childhood but has kept it a secret from everyone, partly due to his hatred of it.
